---
title: "Katharina Imkeller"
image: "../../img/imkeller.jpg"
abstract: "Principal Investigator"
page-layout: custom
date: 11-01-2021
about:
  template: trestles
comments: false
format:
  html:
    css: style.scss
---


::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-5}
\
\


<div class="vertical-line">
</div>

<div  class="content">

  <img src="../../img/imkeller.jpg" alt="Avatar"> 

  <center>
  <a class="button-x" href="https://twitter.com/K_Imkeller" role="button"><i class="bi-twitter"></i> k_imkeller</a>
  <a class="button-github" href="https://github.com/imkeller" role="button"><i class="bi-github"></i> imkeller</a>
  <a class="button-mail" role="button"><i class="bi-envelope"></i> imkeller|rz.uni-frankfurt.de</a>
  </center>
  
</div>

:::


::: {.g-col-5}

<p>&emsp;</p>

# Katharina Imkeller

## Research
Since 2023 W2-Professor for Translational Neurooncology and Quantitative Immunology, Goethe University Frankfurt\

Junior Group Leader in Computational Immunology,
MSNZ/FCI/Edinger Institut, Frankfurt \

Postdoc, German Cancer Research Center and
European Molecular Biology Laboratory, Heidelberg \

PhD Student, German Cancer Research Center, Heidelberg \

PhD Student, Max-Planck Institute for Infection Biology, Berlin


## Education
**Master of Science in Molecular Medicine**, Charité University Berlin \
**Bachelor of Science in Biophysics**, Humboldt University Berlin

## Awards and Scholarships
Doctoral Thesis Prize from the German Society for Biochemistry and Molecular Biology \
EMBO short term fellowship \
Fellowship of the Cusanuswerk

## Publications
[View publications on Europe PMC](https://europepmc.org/search?query=katharina%20imkeller)

:::

:::
